title: scutellaria racemosa
intro: Scutellaria racemosa, also known as Skullcap or Mad Dog Skullcap, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria racemosa include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving insomnia and restlessness, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Scutellaria racemosa can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
